title: Calendly Invitee
description: An invitee is a person who has booked or been booked for a scheduled event in Calendly, including their contact information, booking details, custom question answers, and tracking parameters.

uri.description: The canonical URI of the invitee resource.

email.description: The email address of the invitee.

first_name.description: The first name of the invitee.

last_name.description: The last name of the invitee.

name.description: The full name of the invitee.

status.description: The current status of the invitee.

timezone.description: The IANA timezone of the invitee (e.g., America/New_York).

event.description: The URI of the associated scheduled event.

text_reminder_number.description: The phone number for text reminders, if provided.

rescheduled.description: Whether this invitee was rescheduled from a previous event.

old_invitee.description: The URI of the previous invitee if this was a rescheduled booking.

new_invitee.description: The URI of the new invitee if this booking was rescheduled to a new one.

cancel_url.description: The URL for the invitee to cancel the event.

reschedule_url.description: The URL for the invitee to reschedule the event.

routing_form_submission.description: The URI of the routing form submission that led to this booking, if applicable.

questions_and_answers.description: The invitee's answers to custom questions on the event type booking page.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the invitee was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the invitee was last updated.

Cancellation.description: Information about the cancellation of the invitee's booking.

canceled_by.description: The name or identifier of the person who canceled.

reason.description: The reason provided for the cancellation.

canceler_type.description: Whether the host or the invitee canceled.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the cancellation occurred.

Payment.description: Payment information if the event type requires payment.

external_id.description: The external payment processor transaction ID.

terms.description: The payment terms displayed to the invitee.

successful.description: Whether the payment was successfully processed.

QuestionAndAnswer.description: A custom question and the invitee's answer from the booking page.

question.description: The text of the custom question.

answer.description: The invitee's answer to the question.

position.description: The display position of the question on the booking page.

Tracking.description: UTM and tracking parameters captured at booking time for attribution.

salesforce_uuid.description: The Salesforce UUID for CRM attribution.
